issues.current_text: a `NumericOps` wrapper around `x` that exposes infix arithmetic operators
issues.problem: The description is accurate for the documented use case but slightly narrow: `NumericOps` also exposes non-infix methods such as `abs`, `sign`, and the `toInt`/`toLong`/`toFloat`/`toDouble` conversions. The wording is consistent with the surrounding scaladoc, which focuses on infix operations, so this is a minor stylistic point.
issues.suggestion: a `NumericOps` wrapper around `x` that exposes infix arithmetic operators and numeric conversion methods

general_feedback: Only one @return tag was filled in (line 37 for `infixNumericOps`). It accurately identifies what is returned (a `NumericOps` instance wrapping `x`) and explains its purpose. Style is consistent with the surrounding scaladoc (lowercase start, backticks for code references). The description focuses on infix arithmetic, which matches the emphasis of the existing prose and @param tags, though `NumericOps` also carries non-infix conversion and sign/abs methods.
